name: live2d-haxe
description: Live2D Cubism SDK for Haxe - GPU shader rendering with multi-backend abstraction (cpp + hl, OpenFL/Flixel/Heaps)
releasenote: v0.9.0: Major update — Motion UserData events (native→Haxe callback + polling), L2DParts chain DSL + tween, FlxL2DGroup multi-model aggregation, L2DWavFileAudioSource (pure Haxe WAV decode + RMS), L2DDebugOverlay (Heaps+OpenFL), haxelib run CLI (--gen-constants/--gen-asset-list/--validate). Breaking: removed convenience delegates from L2DHeapsObject/L2DFlixelComponent (use .core.xxx()).
